controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (payments banks - internal ombudsman) directions, 2026
controls.control_description:
Short Title and Commencement
(1) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Payments Banks -
Internal Ombudsman) Directions, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (payments banks - internal ombudsman) directions, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect except clause 7(2), 14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by june 30, 2026
controls.control_description:
(2) These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect except clause 7(2),
14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by June 30, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect except clause 7(2), 14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by june 30, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure , by an order, suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of the provisions of these directions, either gen
controls.control_description:
Suspension
(1) The Reserve Bank, if it is satisfied that it is expedient so to do, may, by an order,
suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all
of the provisions of these Directions, either generally or in relation to any specified
regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , by an order, suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of the provisions of these directions, either gen

controls.control_objective: To ensure by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit
controls.control_description:
(2) The Reserve Bank may by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any
suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to payments banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') having 10 or more banking outlets in in
controls.control_description:
Applicability
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to Payments Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') having 10 or more
banking outlets in India as on March 31, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to payments banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') having 10 or more banking outlets in in

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to the payments banks, which meets the above mentioned criteria after march 31, 2025, with effect from six months from meeting the
controls.control_description:
(2) The directions shall also be applicable to the Payments Banks, which meets
the above mentioned criteria after March 31, 2025, with effect from six months from
meeting the eligibility criteria.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to the payments banks, which meets the above mentioned criteria after march 31, 2025, with effect from six months from meeting the

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them as below:
controls.control_description:
Definitions
(1) In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them as below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them as below:

controls.control_objective: To ensure whole time director / executive director-in- charge of customer service vertical of the bank
controls.control_description:
(b) "Competent Authority" means Whole Time Director / Executive Director-in-
charge of customer service vertical of the bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to whole time director / executive director-in- charge of customer service vertical of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure a representation in writing or through other modes alleging deficiency in service on the part of the bank with or without seeking relief thereon
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a representation in writing or through other modes alleging deficiency in service on the part of the bank with or without seeking relief thereon

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company as defined in the companies act, 2013 and has been granted a certificate of registration under sub-section (2) of section 5 of the credit in
controls.control_description:
(d) "Credit Information Company (CIC)" means a company as defined in the
Companies Act, 2013 and has been granted a certificate of registration under
sub-section (2) of section 5 of the Credit Information Companies (Regulation)
Act, 2005;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company as defined in the companies act, 2013 and has been granted a certificate of registration under sub-section (2) of section 5 of the credit in

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person who uses, or is an applicant for, a service provided by the bank
controls.control_description:
(e) "Customer" means a person who uses, or is an applicant for, a service
provided by the bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person who uses, or is an applicant for, a service provided by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure to provide statutorily or otherwise, which may or may not result in financial loss or damage to the customer
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to provide statutorily or otherwise, which may or may not result in financial loss or damage to the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure any person appointed under clause 6 of these directions
controls.control_description:
IO)" means any person appointed under
clause 6 of these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any person appointed under clause 6 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure regulatory body for financial sector entities and includes:
controls.control_description:
(h) "Financial Sector Regulatory Body" means regulatory body for financial
sector entities and includes:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to regulatory body for financial sector entities and includes:

controls.control_objective: To ensure any person appointed under clause 5 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(i) "Internal Ombudsman (IO)" means any person appointed under clause 5 of
these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any person appointed under clause 5 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
(j) "Regulated Entity (RE)" means a commercial bank or payments bank or
small finance bank or a non-banking financial company or a non-bank prepaid
payment instrument issuer or a credit information company which are covered
under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework, or any other entity
as may be specified by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, the reserve bank of india act, 1934, the payment and settlement syst
controls.control_description:
(2) All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Reserve Bank of
India Act, 1934, the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, the Credit
Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005, the Credit Information Companies
Rules, 2006, the Credit Information Companies Regulations, 2006, or the Reserve
Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme (as amended from time to time) or
regulations, directions and guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, the reserve bank of india act, 1934, the payment and settlement syst

controls.control_objective: To ensure either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a general manager in the re under the purview of the internal ombudsman framework or
controls.control_description:
Appointment of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The IO shall either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a
General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework
or a Financial Sector Regulatory Body, having necessary skills and experience of
minimum seven years of working in areas such as banking, non-banking finance,
regulation, supervision, payment and settlement systems, credit information or
consumer protection.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a general manager in the re under the purview of the internal ombudsman framework or

controls.control_objective: To ensure to relinquish the same before assuming charge as io
controls.control_description:
Provided that, if the person is a serving officer, he / she is required to relinquish
the same before assuming charge as IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to relinquish the same before assuming charge as io

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been previously employed, nor presently be employed, by the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank
controls.control_description:
(2) The IO shall not have been previously employed, nor presently be employed,
by the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been previously employed, nor presently be employed, by the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure
controls.control_description: (3) The IO shall not be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure

controls.control_objective: To ensure work as the io in more than one re simultaneously at the discretion of the res concerned
controls.control_description:
(4) A person may work as the IO in more than one RE simultaneously at the
discretion of the REs concerned, subject to the approval of the Board or Customer
Service Committee / Consumer Protection Committee of the Board of the appointing
RE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to work as the io in more than one re simultaneously at the discretion of the res concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a deputy general manager in the re under the purview of the internal ombudsman frame
controls.control_description:
IO shall either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to
a Deputy General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman
framework or a Financial Sector Regulatory Body, having necessary skills and
experience of minimum five years of working in areas such as banking, non-banking
finance, regulation, supervision, payment and settlement systems, credit information
or consumer protection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a deputy general manager in the re under the purview of the internal ombudsman frame

controls.control_objective: To ensure to relinquish the same before assuming charge as dy
controls.control_description:
Provided that, if the person is a serving officer, he / she is required to relinquish
the same before assuming charge as Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to relinquish the same before assuming charge as dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been previously employed, nor presently be employed, by the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank
controls.control_description:
IO shall not have been previously employed, nor presently be
employed, by the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been previously employed, nor presently be employed, by the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure
controls.control_description: IO shall not be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be employed in more than one re simultaneously
controls.control_description: IO shall not be employed in more than one RE simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be employed in more than one re simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint at least one io
controls.control_description:
Number of Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal Ombudsman
(1) Every bank shall appoint at least one IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint at least one io

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine, at least once in a year, the number of io/ dy
controls.control_description:
(2) The Customer Service Committee of the Board of the bank shall determine, at
least once in a year, the number of IO/ Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine, at least once in a year, the number of io/ dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the need for diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases
controls.control_description:
IO, the bank shall consider the need for
diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the need for diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly define the jurisdiction of each io / dy
controls.control_description:
In such
cases, the bank may clearly define the jurisdiction of each IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly define the jurisdiction of each io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be contractual
controls.control_description: IO in the bank shall be contractual.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be contractual

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the post of the io does not remain vacant at any point of time
controls.control_description:
(2) The bank shall ensure that the post of the IO does not remain vacant at any
point of time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the post of the io does not remain vacant at any point of time

controls.control_objective: To ensure designate its serving official equivalent to the general manager rank as the io for a period not exceeding one month, with the approval of the custome
controls.control_description:
(3) In a rare case where both IO/s and Dy IO/s are on leave / absent, the bank may
designate its serving official equivalent to the General Manager rank as the IO for a
period not exceeding one month, with the approval of the Customer Service
Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to designate its serving official equivalent to the general manager rank as the io for a period not exceeding one month, with the approval of the custome

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any reporting relationship with the business verticals of the bank during the period in which he/she is designated as the io
controls.control_description:
Such official shall not have any reporting relationship with the
business verticals of the bank during the period in which he/she is designated as the
IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any reporting relationship with the business verticals of the bank during the period in which he/she is designated as the io

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a fixed term of not less than three years
controls.control_description:
IO in the bank shall be a fixed term of not less than
three years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a fixed term of not less than three years

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed five years
controls.control_description: IO in the bank shall not exceed five years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed five years

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake the process of fresh appointment at least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent io and ensure that there is a
controls.control_description:
(5) To fill a vacancy, the bank shall undertake the process of fresh appointment at
least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent IO and
ensure that there is a reasonable overlap between the time of demitting of office of the
outgoing IO and the incoming IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake the process of fresh appointment at least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent io and ensure that there is a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be removed before the completion of his/her contracted term without the approval of the customer service committee of the board
controls.control_description:
IO shall not be removed before the completion of his/her
contracted term without the approval of the Customer Service Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be removed before the completion of his/her contracted term without the approval of the customer service committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform reserve bank of india within 10 working days from the date of such vacancy and shall appoint a new io / dy
controls.control_description:
In case a vacancy arises on account of reasons beyond the control of the bank (such
<image>
as resignation, incapacitation, illness, death, etc.), the bank shall inform Reserve Bank
of India within 10 working days from the date of such vacancy and shall appoint a new
IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform reserve bank of india within 10 working days from the date of such vacancy and shall appoint a new io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine the structure of emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the io / dy
controls.control_description:
(7) The Customer Service Committee of the Board of the bank shall determine the
structure of emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine the structure of emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriate keeping in view the stature and position of the io / dy
controls.control_description:
IO, which
should be appropriate keeping in view the stature and position of the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriate keeping in view the stature and position of the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be changed adversely during the tenure of the io / dy
controls.control_description:
IO, once determined, shall not be changed adversely
during the tenure of the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be changed adversely during the tenure of the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the competent authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(b) of the directions, of the bank administratively, and to the customer service commit
controls.control_description:
Administrative Oversight
(1) The IO shall report to the Competent Authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(b)
of the Directions, of the bank administratively, and to the Customer Service Committee
of the Board of the bank functionally.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the competent authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(b) of the directions, of the bank administratively, and to the customer service commit

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide such number of its officers and staff to the office of the io as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the io
controls.control_description:
Secretariat of the office of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The bank shall provide such number of its officers and staff to the office of the
IO as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide such number of its officers and staff to the office of the io as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the io

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the office of the io to enable the io/ dy
controls.control_description:
(2) All other requisite office infrastructure, including information technology support
shall be made available to the office of the IO to enable the IO/ Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the office of the io to enable the io/ dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure preferably be placed in the head office or corporate office of the bank
controls.control_description:
(3) The office of the IO may preferably be placed in the Head Office or Corporate
Office of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preferably be placed in the head office or corporate office of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct an audit of the implementation of these directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:
controls.control_description:
Internal Audit
(1) The Internal Audit Department of the bank shall conduct an audit of the
implementation of these Directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct an audit of the implementation of these directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:

controls.control_objective: To ensure exclude any assessment of the correctness of decisions taken by the io / dy
controls.control_description:
(2) The scope of the internal audit shall exclude any assessment of the correctness
of decisions taken by the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exclude any assessment of the correctness of decisions taken by the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure handle complaints received directly from the complainants or members of the public
controls.control_description:
Role and Responsibilities of Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal
Ombudsman
(1) The office of the IO shall not handle complaints received directly from the
complainants or members of the public.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to handle complaints received directly from the complainants or members of the public

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal with the complaints that have already been examined by the bank but have been partially resolved or being wholly rejected by the bank
controls.control_description:
It shall deal with the complaints that have
already been examined by the bank but have been partially resolved or being wholly
rejected by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal with the complaints that have already been examined by the bank but have been partially resolved or being wholly rejected by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure represent the bank in legal cases before any court or fora or authority
controls.control_description:
IO shall not represent the bank in legal cases before any court or
fora or authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to represent the bank in legal cases before any court or fora or authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide any or all complaints, the power for the dy
controls.control_description: (3) While the IO may decide any or all complaints, the power for the Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide any or all complaints, the power for the dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be defined under a policy approved by the customer service committee of the board
controls.control_description:
IO to
decide the complaints may be defined under a policy approved by the Customer
Service Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be defined under a policy approved by the customer service committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure recommend suitable compensation to the complainant, as per the compensation prescribed by the reserve bank of india in its extant guidelines
controls.control_description:
IO shall recommend suitable compensation to the complainant, as
per the compensation prescribed by the Reserve Bank of India in its extant guidelines,
if any, and as per the compensation policy of the bank, if any, in case there is no
prescription from the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to recommend suitable compensation to the complainant, as per the compensation prescribed by the reserve bank of india in its extant guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure recommend compensation in accordance with the reserve bank- integrated ombudsman scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential loss and
controls.control_description:
(5) The IO may recommend compensation in accordance with the Reserve Bank-
Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential
loss and the loss of time, expenses incurred and harassment / mental agony suffered
by the complainant, over and above the compensation recommended in clause 12(4).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recommend compensation in accordance with the reserve bank- integrated ombudsman scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential loss and

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints received against the bank, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group- wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the bank for policy intervention
controls.control_description:
(6) The office of IO shall, on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints
received against the bank, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group-
wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the bank for policy
intervention, if so warranted.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints received against the bank, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group- wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the bank for policy intervention

controls.control_objective: To ensure suggest means for taking actions to address the root cause of complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the
controls.control_description:
(7) The IO shall suggest means for taking actions to address the root cause of
complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to suggest means for taking actions to address the root cause of complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure have 'read-only' access to the reserve bank's complaint management system to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the rbi ombudsman / appellate
controls.control_description:
IO shall have 'read-only' access to the Reserve Bank's Complaint
Management System to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the RBI
Ombudsman / Appellate Authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have 'read-only' access to the reserve bank's complaint management system to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the rbi ombudsman / appellate

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek such access for the io / dy
controls.control_description: The bank shall seek such access for the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek such access for the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure functionally report to the io
controls.control_description: IO shall functionally report to the IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to functionally report to the io

controls.control_objective: To ensure be designated as a permanent invitee to the meetings of the customer service committee of the board
controls.control_description:
Board Oversight
(1) The IO shall be designated as a permanent invitee to the meetings of the
Customer Service Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be designated as a permanent invitee to the meetings of the customer service committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken by the customer service committee of the board to have representation of more than one io or having a system of rotation
controls.control_description:
In banks having multiple IOs, a view shall
be taken by the Customer Service Committee of the Board to have representation of
more than one IO or having a system of rotation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken by the customer service committee of the board to have representation of more than one io or having a system of rotation

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on his / her activities to the customer service committee of the board, preferably at
controls.control_description:
(2) The IO shall furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on
his / her activities to the Customer Service Committee of the Board, preferably at
quarterly, but not less than half yearly, intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on his / her activities to the customer service committee of the board, preferably at

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the customer service committee of the board of the bank for review
controls.control_description:
IO has been overruled by the
Competent Authority shall be placed before the Customer Service Committee of the
Board of the bank for review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the customer service committee of the board of the bank for review

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be placed before the customer service committee of the board, on quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
(5) Information on the complaints resolved by the RBI Ombudsman in favour of
complainant, either partially or fully, shall also be placed before the Customer Service
Committee of the Board, on quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be placed before the customer service committee of the board, on quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accompanied with an analysis of minimum top five categories of complaints along with remedial measures so as to avoid complaints of a similar natur
controls.control_description:
The information shall be accompanied
with an analysis of minimum top five categories of complaints along with remedial
measures so as to avoid complaints of a similar nature in future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accompanied with an analysis of minimum top five categories of complaints along with remedial measures so as to avoid complaints of a similar natur

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place by the bank and access to the system shall be provided to the io / dy
controls.control_description:
Procedure for Complaint Redress by Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal
Ombudsman
(1) A fully automated Complaints Management System shall be put in place by the
bank and access to the System shall be provided to the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place by the bank and access to the system shall be provided to the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be auto escalated to the office of the io for review
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be auto escalated to the office of the io for review

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide only three categories i
controls.control_description: (2) The bank shall provide only three categories i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide only three categories i

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a standard operating procedure (sop) for flow of complaints and information in a time bound manner
controls.control_description:
(3) The bank shall formulate a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for flow of
complaints and information in a time bound manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to formulate a standard operating procedure (sop) for flow of complaints and information in a time bound manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a complaint is not closed by the same branch/ unit / other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected
controls.control_description:
(4) The bank shall ensure that a complaint is not closed by the same branch/ unit /
other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a complaint is not closed by the same branch/ unit / other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed at a fairly senior level, which the bank may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the office of io
controls.control_description:
A
complaint which is being wholly rejected or partially resolved shall be reviewed at a
fairly senior level, which the bank may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the
office of IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed at a fairly senior level, which the bank may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the office of io

controls.control_objective: To ensure be handled by the io/ dy
controls.control_description:
(5) The following types of complaints shall be outside the purview of these
Directions and shall not be handled by the IO/ Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be handled by the io/ dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure forward all rejected / partially resolved complaints under the categories
controls.control_description: The bank shall forward all rejected / partially resolved complaints under the categories
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to forward all rejected / partially resolved complaints under the categories

controls.control_objective: To ensure look for inherent deficiency in service in such cases and take a view whether any of these complaints can be exempted under
controls.control_description:
IO, who shall look for inherent deficiency in service in
such cases and take a view whether any of these complaints can be exempted under
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to look for inherent deficiency in service in such cases and take a view whether any of these complaints can be exempted under

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately returned back to the bank by the io / dy
controls.control_description:
Complaints that are outside the purview
of these Directions shall be immediately returned back to the bank by the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately returned back to the bank by the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine the complaints based on records available with the bank, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments/ clarifications fur
controls.control_description:
IO shall examine the complaints based on records available with
the bank, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments/
clarifications furnished by the bank to the specific queries of the IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine the complaints based on records available with the bank, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments/ clarifications fur

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold meetings with the concerned functionaries of the bank and seek any additional record / document available with the bank that are necessary for ex
controls.control_description:
IO may hold meetings with the concerned functionaries of the bank
and seek any additional record / document available with the bank that are necessary
for examining the complaint and reviewing the decision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold meetings with the concerned functionaries of the bank and seek any additional record / document available with the bank that are necessary for ex

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the final decision is communicated to the complainant within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of complaint by the bank
controls.control_description:
(9) The bank shall ensure that the final decision is communicated to the
complainant within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of complaint by the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the final decision is communicated to the complainant within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of complaint by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure record a "reasoned decision" in each case
controls.control_description: IO shall record a "reasoned decision" in each case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to record a "reasoned decision" in each case

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly state that the said complaint has been reviewed by the io / dy
controls.control_description:
IO upholds the decision of the bank to reject or partially
resolve the complaint, the reply to the complainant should explicitly state that the said
complaint has been reviewed by the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explicitly state that the said complaint has been reviewed by the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure advise the complainant about the option of approaching the rbi ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints not covered <image> under the reserve bank-
controls.control_description:
IO, the bank shall advise the complainant about the option of
approaching the RBI Ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints not covered
<image>
under the Reserve Bank- Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to
time) along with complete details of the complaint.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to advise the complainant about the option of approaching the rbi ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints not covered <image> under the reserve bank-

controls.control_objective: To ensure also mention the url of reserve bank's complaint management system portal for online filing of customer complaints (https://cms
controls.control_description:
The bank in its reply shall also
mention the URL of Reserve Bank's Complaint Management System portal for online
filing of customer complaints (https://cms.rbi.org.in) and the physical / email address
of the Centralised Receipt and Processing Centre1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also mention the url of reserve bank's complaint management system portal for online filing of customer complaints (https://cms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mandatorily included in the information to be submitted by the bank to the rbi ombudsman if the complaint was already reviewed by the io / dy
controls.control_description:
IO shall be mandatorily included in the information to be submitted by the bank
to the RBI Ombudsman if the complaint was already reviewed by the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mandatorily included in the information to be submitted by the bank to the rbi ombudsman if the complaint was already reviewed by the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessarily seek his/ her comments and submit the same to the rbi ombudsman
controls.control_description:
IO, the bank shall
necessarily seek his/ her comments and submit the same to the RBI Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to necessarily seek his/ her comments and submit the same to the rbi ombudsman

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the analysis of complaints handled by io / dy
controls.control_description: (14) The bank shall use the analysis of complaints handled by IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the analysis of complaints handled by io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be involved in such trainings
controls.control_description:
IO may also be involved
in such trainings, where necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be involved in such trainings

controls.control_objective: To ensure also analyse the number of cases where there is substantive difference between the decisions of the io / dy
controls.control_description:
IO towards developing uniformity across the
bank in the redress of complaints, the Customer Service Committee of the Board shall
also analyse the number of cases where there is substantive difference between the
decisions of the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also analyse the number of cases where there is substantive difference between the decisions of the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure widely disseminate the guidelines / instructions regarding these directions among the staff while communicating the appointment of io/ dy
controls.control_description:
(16) The bank shall widely disseminate the guidelines / instructions regarding these
Directions among the staff while communicating the appointment of IO/ Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to widely disseminate the guidelines / instructions regarding these directions among the staff while communicating the appointment of io/ dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide the contact details of the io / dy
controls.control_description: (17) The bank shall not provide the contact details of the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide the contact details of the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure handle complaints received directly from the customers
controls.control_description:
IO shall not handle complaints received directly from the
customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to handle complaints received directly from the customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a part of the supervisory review by the department of supervision of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Supervisory Oversight
(1) The areas relating to customer service and customer grievance redress, as well
as the implementation of these Directions, shall be a part of the supervisory review by
the Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a part of the supervisory review by the department of supervision of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the cases where the decision of the io / dy
controls.control_description:
(2) Consumer Education and Protection Department of the Reserve Bank may
review the cases where the decision of the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the cases where the decision of the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure deem fit
controls.control_description:
IO has not been accepted by the
bank and the aggrieved complainant approaches the RBI Ombudsman, for assessing
the effectiveness of the internal grievance redress mechanism of the bank and
initiating corrective actions as it may deem fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deem fit

controls.control_objective: To ensure , within five working days of appointment of the io or dy
controls.control_description:
Reporting to Reserve Bank
(1) The bank shall, within five working days of appointment of the IO or Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , within five working days of appointment of the io or dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a system of periodic reporting of information to the consumer education and protection department, central office, reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
Date of intimation to the Reserve Bank
(2) The bank shall put in place a system of periodic reporting of information to the
Consumer Education and Protection Department, Central Office, Reserve Bank of
India, on a quarterly basis as per format provided in the Annexure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a system of periodic reporting of information to the consumer education and protection department, central office, reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted on or before the 15th day of the month following the quarter to which it relates to
controls.control_description:
The report shall
be submitted on or before the 15th day of the month following the quarter to which it
relates to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted on or before the 15th day of the month following the quarter to which it relates to

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to have been made under these directions
controls.control_description:
(2) All appointments / actions under the aforesaid Master Direction, prior to the
coming into effect of these Directions, shall be deemed to have been made under
these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to have been made under these directions
